features: Jolly Good Grooming Company Cedarwood Beard Oil 100% Natural Essential Oil 30ml
A blend of natural & essential oils. Fast absorbing and ultra light. Coats and softens beard hair.
This fast absorbing beard oil will help to hydrate your hair, make your skin feel less dry & itchy & leave you looking well groomed.
description: Product Description Grooming Natural Cedarwood Beard Oil 30ml Directions Apply a few drops to the beard and skin daily. Safety Warning FOR EXTERNAL USE ONLY See more
